notes: Four scenarios: per-symbol kill, global halt, reboot/recovery, operator handoff. Copy validated against D047 trust-markers checklist (no false claim of active order-blocking; the subtitle explicitly discloses `Sprint 2 ships the switch, not the wiring`). Reason textarea required on activate; clear is one-click to keep panic-recovery fast. Colour semantic: red = safety-action, matches _BASE_CSS --red token.
